entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: The crop studied for biomass and grain yield variability.

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the barley crop.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area of barley.

entities.name: FACTOR ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify underlying common factors among correlated soil variables.

entities.name: MULTIPLE REGRESSION ANALYSES
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the influence of multiple soil properties on crop yield and biomass.

entities.name: COVARIANCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to study the variation among soil variables.

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical soil property (TN) that influences crop production.

entities.name: AVAILABLE PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A chemical soil property (Pava) that influences crop production.

entities.name: AVAILABLE POTASSIUM
entities.description: A chemical soil property (Kava) analyzed in the soil samples.

entities.name: CATION-EXCHANGE CAPACITY
entities.description: A soil property (CEC) analyzed in the soil samples.

entities.name: ELECTRICAL CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: A soil property (EC) that influences barley production.

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A soil property that influences barley production.

entities.name: MEAN WEIGHT DIAMETER OF AGGREGATES
entities.description: A soil physical property (MWD) analyzed in the soil samples.

entities.name: WATER-STABLE AGGREGATES
entities.description: A soil physical property (WSA) analyzed in the soil samples.

entities.name: FIELD CAPACITY VOLUMETRIC
entities.description: A soil property (FC) that influences barley production.

entities.name: AVAILABLE WATER-HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: A soil property (AWHC) that influences barley production.

entities.name: BULK DENSITY
entities.description: A soil physical property (BD) analyzed in the soil samples.

entities.name: CALCIUM CARBONATE EQUIVALENT
entities.description: A soil property (CCE) analyzed in the soil samples.

entities.name: SODIUM ADSORPTION RATIO
entities.description: A soil property (SAR) that influences barley production.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: A common factor derived from soil variables that influences barley biomass and grain yield.

entities.name: SODICITY
entities.description: A common factor derived from soil variables that influences barley biomass and grain yield.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: A common factor derived from soil variables that influences barley biomass and grain yield.

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: A common factor derived from soil variables that influences barley biomass and grain yield.

entities.name: NORTHERN IRAN
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted.

entities.name: ARID REGION
entities.description: The climatic condition of the study area in northern Iran.

entities.name: SITE-SPECIFIC MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Management systems that require understanding of soil property variability and its effect on yield.

entities.description: The variation of soil properties and crop yield within a single field.
